# TrainerOS

> SaaS platform for personal trainers to create, manage, and share workout plans with clients.

## What it does

- Personal trainers create structured workout plans with exercises, sets, reps, and notes
- Each plan gets a unique shareable link — clients open it on mobile without an account or app
- Trainers manage clients, track progress, and organize exercise libraries
- Plans support drag-and-drop reordering and auto-save

## Pricing

- Basic plan: 59 PLN/month — core plan creation and client sharing
- Pro plan: 99 PLN/month — unlimited clients, advanced features
- 14-day free trial, no credit card required

## Who it's for

Personal trainers and fitness coaches who want a simple, professional way to deliver training programs to clients without requiring clients to install an app.

## Key URLs

- Homepage & signup: https://traineros.live
- Login: https://traineros.live/login
- Register: https://traineros.live/register

## Not indexed (private)

- /dashboard/ — trainer workspace
- /clients/ — client management
- /api/ — backend API
